reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku (not Tokyo). Tool fetched Akita spots but none have sakura_meisho kinds or cherry blossom markers in the visible data. Fireworks, castles, lakes returned — no sakura filtering applied. The one real sakura spot (Kakunodate) is not visible in truncated response.
missing_data: Cherry blossom specific spots (sakura_meisho_100 kind) across Tohoku — should call multiple Tohoku prefectures or filter by kind. Hirosaki Park (Aomori), Kakunodate (Akita), Kitakami (Iwate) absent from visible results.
improvement_hint: Add kind-filter support to get_spots so queries like 'sakura' route to sakura_meisho_100 tagged spots. Multi-prefecture Tohoku fan-out needed.

reasoning: Query asks for major sake breweries in Niigata. Tool returns 24 items including Koshi no Kanbai, Hakkaisan, Kubota with QIDs and descriptions. However, agent sees edamame GI mixed in, and the tool is get_local_specialty (brands/GI), not actual physical brewery locations. Intent partially met.
missing_data: Physical addresses and visiting hours for breweries. Brewery tourism info (tasting rooms, tours). Major brands like Hakutsuru, Kubota brewery location detail.
improvement_hint: Add brewery visit metadata (open for tours Y/N, address, tasting hours) to sake_brewery kind entries. Separate brand records from venue records more explicitly.

reasoning: Query asks for ski resorts WITH hot springs (onsen) in Hakuba. Tool gets Hakuba spots and returns Happo-One ski resort (correct). But no onsen data visible. The response doesn't connect ski+onsen. Municipal scrape noise (UN Tourism award page) appears. No onsen venue data in results.
missing_data: Onsen facilities in Hakuba: Hakuba Happo Onsen, Mimizuku Onsen. Explicit onsen attribute linking to nearby ski resorts. The dual constraint (ski + onsen) is unresolved.
improvement_hint: Implement onsen proximity join — for ski_resort spots, surface nearby onsen within municipality. Add 'onsen_nearby' flag or cross-reference onsen kinds in same municipality.

reasoning: Query asks for autumn foliage (koyo) spots in Kansai region. Tool only fetches Kyoto — missing Osaka, Nara, Hyogo, Shiga. Spots returned are generic Kyoto landmarks (Nijo Castle, Toji Temple) without koyo-specific tagging. No foliage season metadata or momiji meisho kind filtering.
missing_data: Kansai-wide coverage: Osaka (Minoo Park), Nara (Yoshikien), Shiga (Eikan-do equivalent), Hyogo spots. Foliage-specific kinds (momiji_meisho or koyo tags). Peak timing info.
improvement_hint: Implement Kansai region fan-out for get_spots. Add koyo/momiji_meisho kind tag to foliage-famous spots. Season metadata for foliage peak windows would directly answer intent.

reasoning: Query in Arabic asks for famous cherry blossom spots in Kansai. Tool returns Nara with Mount Yoshino (sakura_meisho_100 ranked) at top — a world-renowned cherry blossom site. Good relevance. Missing Osaka and Kyoto coverage for full Kansai scope, but Nara core result is excellent.
missing_data: Kyoto cherry blossom spots (Maruyama Park, Philosopher's Path). Osaka (Osaka Castle). Multi-prefecture Kansai fan-out needed for completeness.
improvement_hint: Region fan-out: when prefecture='Nara' and intent signals sakura, expand to adjacent Kansai prefectures. Surface sakura_meisho_100 kind entries first via ranking boost.

reasoning: Query asks for stargazing spots on Okinawa's remote islands (離島). Tool returns generic Okinawa spots — castles (Nakagusuku, Tamaudun), Kumejima town entity, Zakimi Castle. No dark_sky kind, no stargazing data, no island-specific filtering. Completely misses the 離島+星空constraint pair.
missing_data: Dark sky designated spots: Iriomote-Ishigaki National Park, Miyako-jima dark sky, Yonaguni. Island-specific get_spots calls (Iriomote, Ishigaki, Miyako). dark_sky or hoshi_zora kind tags.
improvement_hint: Add dark_sky kind tag to nationally/internationally designated dark sky parks. Support island municipality filter in get_spots. Route stargazing queries to dark_sky kind filtering.

reasoning: Query in Thai asks for rural onsen accommodation in Hokkaido. Tool returns hito_yu_kai members (秘湯 certified) which are genuinely rural hidden hot springs — exactly right. Chinaichi Onsen, Ginkonyu, Yukomansou at Tokachidake, Yukikomaso at Asahidake. Good match. ANA Holiday Inn Sapporo is urban noise.
missing_data: Coordinates missing for all hito_yu_kai entries — limits practical planning. English names absent. City hotel (ANA HI Sapporo) contaminates rural intent.
improvement_hint: Geocode hito_yu_kai entries. Filter out urban hotels when 'rural' or '田舎' intent is detected. Add English translations for hito_yu_kai ryokan names.

reasoning: Query in Vietnamese asks for islands in the Seto Inland Sea worth visiting. Tool fetches Kagawa spots. Ritsurin Garden, Mannō Lake, Marugame Castle appear — all on mainland Kagawa, not islands. No island entities (Naoshima, Shodoshima, Teshima) visible in truncated response.
missing_data: Seto Inland Sea island spots: Naoshima (art island), Shodoshima, Teshima, Megijima. Island kind filter. Multi-prefecture Seto coverage (Hiroshima, Okayama, Ehime islands too).
improvement_hint: Add 'island' kind filter to get_spots. For 'Seto Inland Sea islands' queries, implement regional island-entity fan-out across Kagawa, Hiroshima, Okayama, Ehime. Rank island kind spots first.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Tool returns METI craft designations: Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave (indigo textile) and Awa Washi (indigo paper). Correct crafts identified. However, no workshop venues or experience providers — just product designations. Otani Ware (ceramics) is tangential.
missing_data: Workshop/experience venue names, addresses, booking info for actual indigo dyeing experiences. Awa-ai cultivation area tour spots. Physical experience providers not returned.
improvement_hint: Link METI craft designations to see_also_wikidata_venues with craft_experience or workshop kind tags. Separate 'craft product' from 'craft experience' in response metadata.

reasoning: Query in German asks for Buddhist temple lodging (shukubo) on Mount Koya. Tool returns koyasan_shukubo association members: Annyoin, Ichijoin, Ekoin, Kitamuroin, Kumagaiji — exactly matching the intent. Confirmed confidence, Koyasan Shukubo Association authority. Descriptions in Japanese but names clear.
missing_data: English translations for shukubo names. Booking URLs or direct website links (website: null for most). Coordinates absent for map planning.
improvement_hint: Enrich koyasan_shukubo entries with English translations and direct booking URLs. Add geocoordinates via OSM cross-match for Koyasan temples.

reasoning: Query asks for samurai districts outside Kyoto. search_area returns 153 results with buke_yashiki kind. Kakunodate (Akita) prominently returned with full description, heritage designations, coordinates. Shimane and Fukui entries also present. Broad geographic coverage achieved with 'outside Kyoto' constraint respected.
missing_data: Aizu Wakamatsu buke yashiki (Fukushima), Hagi (Yamaguchi) samurai district. Some entries lack coordinates (Q104709269). Description depth varies.
improvement_hint: Boost prominence of nationally recognized samurai preservation districts. Filter Kyoto results when 'outside Kyoto' intent detected. Ensure all buke_yashiki entries have coordinates.

reasoning: Query in Indonesian asks for summer festivals in Akita. Tool returns only 3 bunka_intangible items — Dainichido Bugaku (January), Kakunodate Festival (September), Tsuchizaki Shinmei. Missing the iconic Akita summer festivals: Kanto Festival (August) and Noshiro Nebuta. Date field null on most entries — summer constraint unverifiable.
missing_data: Akita Kanto Festival (August), Noshiro Nebuta. Scraped_schema_event entries for Akita summer events absent. Date metadata critical for season filtering is null on most records.
improvement_hint: Expand festival coverage via scraped_schema_event for Akita (Kanto Festival should be in tourism board scrapes). Add summer month filter routing. Populate date fields for bunka_intangible festivals.

reasoning: Query in Korean asks for small fishing port towns in San'in. Tool returns Shimane general spots: Lake Shinji, Matsue Castle, Iwami Ginzan Silver Mine, Mount Sanbe — no fishing village (漁港 or 漁村) entities. No port/harbor kind data. Tottori (also San'in) not included.
missing_data: Fishing port towns: Onomichi, Hamada fishing port, Masuda harbor. Harbor/port kind tags. Tottori San'in coast coverage. Sakaiminato (gateway for Shimane/Tottori boundary).
improvement_hint: Add fishing_port or gyoko kind tag to harbor towns. Fan out to Tottori for San'in region queries. Scrape Shimane fishing village DMO content (Hamada, Masuda tourism pages).

reasoning: Query asks where to EXPERIENCE washi papermaking in Gifu. Tool returns METI craft designations — Mino Ware, Hida Shunkei lacquer, Nagiso wood turning, Ichii wood carving. Mino Washi (0905) is likely in the full 8 items but not shown. Returns product designations, not experience venues.
missing_data: Mino Washi (craft 0905) experience venues: Udatsu no Machinami in Mino City, washi experience studios. Physical workshop addresses. Mino Washi Museum.
improvement_hint: Add craft experience venue cross-reference. When query includes 'experience/workshop/try', surface see_also_wikidata_venues with workshop_experience kind. Mino Washi craft (0905) should appear in results.

reasoning: Query in Spanish asks for fishing villages on the Noto Peninsula. Tool returns generic Ishikawa spots: Kanazawa Castle, Kenroku-en, Oyama Shrine — all in Kanazawa city, not Noto Peninsula at all. No municipality filter for Noto. Wajima (漆器/朝市), Suzu, Monzen fishing villages completely absent.
missing_data: Noto Peninsula municipalities: Wajima, Suzu, Noto-cho fishing villages. Wajima morning market. Noto-specific get_spots call needed. Fishing village kind tags.
improvement_hint: Support sub-prefecture region routing: 'Noto Peninsula' should trigger municipality-level calls for Wajima, Suzu, Anamizu, Nanao. Add fishing_village kind to Noto coastal settlements.

reasoning: Query asks for lesser-known sand dunes beyond Tottori. search_area returns 91 results. Tottori appears first (expected) but also Fukiagehama (Kagoshima), Ishikari dunes (Hokkaido), Onjuku Beach (Chiba). Geographic diversity good. Tottori duplicate (BUNKA-2127 + Q780905) is minor noise.
missing_data: Nakatajima Sand Dunes (Hamamatsu, Shizuoka), Sakata dunes (Niigata), Hamaoka dunes. Some entries lack coordinates. Description depth thin for lesser-known entries.
improvement_hint: Deduplicate Tottori Sand Dunes (two QIDs for same entity). Enrich lesser-known sand dune entries with descriptions explaining why they're notable vs Tottori.

reasoning: Query in Chinese asks for traditional crafts in San'in region. Tool returns Shimane only (not Tottori, also San'in). 4 items with Chinese descriptions: Iwami Ware, Sekishu Washi, Unshū Soroban, Izumo Stone Lanterns — all legitimate and well-described. Missing Tottori crafts (Tottori Mingei).
missing_data: Tottori prefecture crafts (San'in includes both Shimane and Tottori). Tottori Mingei pottery, Inshū Washi paper. Region fan-out to Tottori when San'in query detected.
improvement_hint: Implement San'in region fan-out: auto-include Tottori when Shimane queried and intent signals San'in region. Add region_fanout_applied flag properly.

reasoning: Query asks for lavender fields in Hokkaido BEYOND Furano. Tool returns generic Hokkaido spots — Shōwa-shinzan volcano, Sapporo Clock Tower, Matsumae Castle. No lavender kind, no flower field data. Even Farm Tomita (Furano) not present. The lavender/flower field constraint completely unaddressed.

reasoning: Query in Filipino asks for 'traditional coffee towns in Kyushu' (mga tradisyonal na bayan ng kape). Tool returns Oita spots — Usuki Castle, Usa Jingū, Oka Castle, Kokonoe tourism — none related to coffee or old townscapes (古い町並み). Intent mismatch on both coffee and old-town sub-intents. Complete constraint failure.
missing_data: Coffee culture spots in Kyushu: Itoshima coffee farms, Naha Kokusai-dori coffee culture. Old townscape (machinami) spots: Yanagawa, Hita (Oita actually has Hita Mameda-machi). The topic likely means traditional townscape (古い町並み) not literal coffee.
improvement_hint: Improve intent parsing for non-Japanese multilingual queries. 'Bayan ng kape' likely maps to 古い町並み or kominka; route to preservation_district / machinami kinds. Add Hita Mameda-machi to Oita results.

reasoning: Query asks for kominka (old farmhouse) stays in Hokuriku. missing_data: Kominka guesthouses: Shirakawa-go minshuku, Gokayama farmhouse stays (Toyama, Hokuriku!). kominka or gassho-zukuri stay kinds. Toyama and Fukui prefectures also part of Hokuriku but not queried.
wrong_data: "Student housing 1" (OSM node) appearing as accommodation is noise data that should be filtered.
improvement_hint: Filter OSM student housing nodes from hotel results. Add kominka_stay / machiya_stay kind tags. Fan out to Toyama+Fukui for Hokuriku query. Cross-reference Shirakawa-go village accommodation entities.

reasoning: Query asks for mountain shrines on Kii Peninsula. get_japan_heritage returns Kongōbu-ji, Negoro-ji, Kumano Kodō, Kumano Sanzan with full heritage designations and coordinates. UNESCO WHS pilgrimage context well surfaced. Tool scope note correctly directs to related tools. Excellent coverage of mountain sacred sites.
missing_data: Nachi Taisha waterfall shrine specifics. Yoshino/Kinpusen-ji (Nara side of Kii). Physical access routes/transportation for remote shrines.
improvement_hint: Add cross-prefecture coverage: Mie (Ise Jingu) and Nara (Kinpusen-ji) Kii Peninsula sites. Include trekking route metadata for pilgrimage context.

reasoning: Query asks for summer fireworks festivals along the Sea of Japan coast. Tool returns 129 Niigata events including Nagaoka Grand Fireworks (August) — a top-tier result. But first items are cherry blossom and flower festivals in May. No coastal/Sea of Japan filter. Omagari, Tsuruoka (Yamagata) absent. Single prefecture limits Sea of Japan scope.
missing_data: Sea of Japan coast multi-prefecture coverage: Yamagata, Akita, Ishikawa, Toyama fireworks. Akita Fireworks (Omagari in Daisen) is arguably #1 Sea of Japan fireworks event. Coastal location metadata absent.
improvement_hint: Implement summer+fireworks intent filter to surface hanabi events in July-August. Add Sea of Japan coast region fan-out. Omagari (Akita) is critical missing entry for this query.

reasoning: Query asks for traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. Tool returns 2 METI items: Beppu Bamboo Crafts (別府竹細工) — precisely on-target with full description, production areas, technique details. Hakata Ori weave is tangential (partially Oita-designated). Well-structured, authoritative source.
missing_data: Workshop/experience venues for Beppu Bamboo Crafts. Oita Prefectural Museum of History as see_also venue is present but bamboo craft studios/shops in Beppu not surfaced.
improvement_hint: Add bamboo craft workshop venue links from see_also_wikidata_venues. Note Hakata Ori is primarily Fukuoka, Oita is minor — label production area share.

reasoning: Query asks for cycling routes in rural Shikoku. Tool returns Ehime spots. Ōmishima island (cycling_route kind) appears — good signal. But Shimanami Kaidō (the premier Shikoku cycling route crossing Ehime) is not explicitly named in visible truncation. Many castles returned which are off-intent for cycling. Tokushima, Kochi, Kagawa cycling not covered.
missing_data: Shimanami Kaidō explicit entity. Cycling route entities across all 4 Shikoku prefectures. Kochi Shimanto River cycling, Tosa coast routes. cycling_route kind filter not applied.
improvement_hint: Apply cycling_route kind filter when cycling intent detected. Fan out across all 4 Shikoku prefectures. Shimanami Kaidō should rank #1 for Ehime cycling queries.

reasoning: Query asks where to SEE kabuki OUTSIDE Tokyo and Kyoto. Tool returns get_traditional_arts unfiltered (183 items) — Bunraku first, then Kabuki (generic UNESCO entry), then unrelated dances (Chakkirako, Dainichido Bugaku). No venue information, no geographic constraint applied, no performance calendar. Returns art-form definitions not viewing locations.
missing_data: Kabuki performance venues outside Tokyo/Kyoto: Shimbashi Enbujō (actually Tokyo but), Hachioji Kuruma Ningyo, Chichibu Yomatsuri kabuki, rural kabuki stages (Kompira Grand Theater in Kotohira, Kagawa). Venue + schedule data absent.
improvement_hint: Add kabuki_theater kind and rural kabuki stage venues to spots data. get_traditional_arts should filter to kabuki-tagged entries and cross-reference venue spots. Kompira Grand Theater (Kotohira) is a critical missing kabuki venue.
